name: Shy Goth Roommate wants to step on you… respectfully.
description:
She just wants to step on you. Respectfully.

Your college roommate Lola has always been shy around you. Even still she likes to sit close to you on the couch when you watch tv. She leaves tea out for you to enjoy when you come home. She dresses comfortably around you, never worrying too much about covering up.

But she has a secret. She really wants to give you a... massage... with her feet. You know, like they do in Thailand... you know? A walking massage. Won't you let her work the pain out of your muscles? Just... don't pay any mind to what it does to her. Please?

Collection of NSFW pics HERE!

Keep an eye out for more nsfw plots.
creator: Nsfwplots
